market_overview.headline: Market structure remains compromised with both SPY and QQQ in bearish (unstacked) formations while 30% of stocks are in Full Bear mode.
market_overview.detail: Only 28% of stocks maintain Full Bull status versus 30% in Full Bear, with major indices showing crossover potential but still below key EMAs. BTC's Full Bear structure at -15.8% vs 21W reinforces defensive positioning.

reversal_candidates.headline: Bear Rally Reversal Candidates (Bullish EMA Crossover Potential)

items.crossover_detail: 8W just below 13W (0.29%) — bullish cross potential; 13W just above 21W (0.75%) — bearish cross risk

momentum_themes.headline: Memory/Storage and Energy Leading Momentum Acceleration
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology dominates momentum with memory stocks like WDC (+23.4% vs 21W) and MU (+24.2% vs 21W) showing explosive moves. Energy minerals maintain perfect 100% bullish participation with strong 8W momentum.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy and Materials Leading, Tech Services Collapsing

strongest.note: Perfect bullish participation with all 11 stocks in Full Bull mode
Mining sector showing complete bullish alignment despite current pullbacks
Small but perfectly positioned sector with strong momentum

weakest.note: Severe deterioration with 90% of tech services stocks in bearish mode
Complete bearish breakdown across all commercial services names
Banking and financial sector under severe pressure with majority bearish

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth/tech into materials and energy as commodity themes dominate. Financial sector weakness reflects rate and credit concerns.

risk_warnings.headline: Key Risk Factors and Deteriorating Trends

items.text: Both SPY and QQQ below all weekly EMAs with potential for further deterioration
Tech services sector in full collapse mode (90% bearish) signals broad growth rotation
BTC Full Bear structure at -15.8% vs 21W suggests risk-off environment persisting
Financial sector weakness (61% bearish) could signal broader credit/banking stress
